assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes all notification types including auto-upgrade scheduled, available version updates, end-of-life warnings, and security patches with specific examples

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: Response uses color-coded urgency levels with security patches in IMMEDIATE ACTION (red) category and new version available in INFORMATIONAL (green) category

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states EoS warnings require planning upgrade path and scheduling before EoS date, with specific commands for handling < 30 days scenarios

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: While the response mentions reviewing upgrade readiness for auto-upgrade scheduled notifications, it doesn't provide a specific pre-upgrade checklist or detailed checklist execution process

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions security patches may require emergency patch windows and provides commands for applying emergency maintenance exclusions and emergency upgrades

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Response categorizes new versions available in other channels as INFORMATIONAL with 'no immediate action' and notes they should be added to quarterly review cycle

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: Response includes specific Cloud Monitoring alert policy YAML configuration and Cloud Logging filters for different notification types, though doesn't explicitly mention Pub/Sub

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: While the response mentions 'Release notes updated' as a type of notification, it doesn't specifically recommend using GKE release notes as the source for understanding version changes
